description_long: This is a roughly oval, medium-sized stone with a flattened top and irregular, sloping sides. Its surface is predominantly gray with subtle variations in tone, interspersed with lighter and darker speckles, and it features a distinct, pebbly texture across much of its exterior. The stone appears weathered, with some areas showing smoother patches and others retaining a coarse, granular finish. A rectangular white label with printed text is affixed to the upper surface, suggesting it may be cataloged or part of a collection. The stone's edges are rounded, and there are no sharp corners, indicating prolonged exposure to natural elements. Its overall appearance suggests it could serve as a natural obstacle or decorative element in an urban park or landscaped area.
description: A medium-sized, gray, oval stone with a pebbly, weathered surface and a white label on top. The stone has rounded edges and a mix of coarse and smoother textures.
description_view_0: The top of the stone is visible, showing the white label and the pebbly texture most clearly, with the stone's flattened upper surface and rounded edges.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the stone's sloping, irregular profile and the continuation of the pebbly texture, with the label partially visible.
description_view_2: The stone appears more triangular from this angle, with the pebbly texture dominating and no label visible, emphasizing the stone's natural, unmarked surface.
description_view_3: This view shows the underside and side of the stone, with the label visible at an angle and the stone's rough, granular surface apparent.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature on the ground
attribute_pattern: Pebbly, irregular texture with scattered speckles and a rectangular label; no regular or artificial patterning.
attribute_weathering: Rough and weathered, with some smoother patches and rounded edges indicating prolonged exposure to the elements.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Typically blends with natural ground cover or landscaping materials, but the label provides a slight visual contrast to its environment.
